nodes.categoryHTML: Open Source Analyzers, Code Fixes, and Refactorings
nodes.itemHTML: • .NET Compiler Platform ("Roslyn") Analyzersstars1k - Diagnostic analyzers developed by the Roslyn team. Initially developed to help flesh out the design and implementation of the static analysis APIs. The analyzers cover code quality, .NET Core, desktop .NET Framework, comments in code, and more.
• How to evolve neural networks in Ruby using the Machine Learning Workbench

• machine_learning_workbenchstars13 - Growing machine learning framework written in pure Ruby, high performance computing using Numo, CUDA bindings through Cumostars86. Currently implementating neural networks, evolutionary strategies, vector quantization, and plenty of examples and utilities.

• Deep NeuroEvolutionstars123 - Experimental setup based on the machine_learning_workbenchstars13 towards searching for deep neural networks (rather than training) using evolutionary algorithms. Applications to the OpenAI Gymstars24.1k using PyCallstars780.

• machine_learning_workbench - Framework including pure-Ruby implementation of both feed-forward and recurrent neural networks (fully connected). Training available using neuroevolution (Natural Evolution Strategies algorithms).

• machine_learning_workbench - Framework including pure-Ruby implementations of Natural Evolution Strategy algorithms (black-box optimization), specifically Exponential NES (XNES), Separable NES (sNES), Block-Diagonal NES (BDNES) and more. Applications include neural network search/training (neuroevolution).
• netDumbsterstars88 - a .Net Fake SMTP Server used for testing. Clone of the popular Dumbster.
• CsvHelperstars3.2k - Library to help reading and writing CSV files.
• Ansible Best Practices by AndiDog - Practices covering many aspects of an Ansible setup, including hints to support different environments (testing, staging, production).

• SharpLab - .NET code playground. Displays intermediate steps and results of code compilation. Shows the code as compiler sees it. Allows selecting different branches and versions of Roslyn. Runs C#, VB.NET, and F# code in the browser.
• OmniSharp - Enables a cross platform .NET development in the editor of your choice. A family of open source projects, each with one goal: To enable a great .NET experience in your editor of choice.
• Testura.Codestars192 - Wrapper around the Roslyn API and used for generation, saving and compiling C# code. It provides methods and helpers to generate classes, methods, statements and expressions.

• roslyn-linq-rewritestars684 - Compiles C# code by first rewriting the syntax trees of LINQ expressions using plain procedural code. This increases performance by minimizes heap allocations and dynamic dispatch.
